CREATE TABLE bitmaps_table (id UInt32, bitmap_data AggregateFunction(bitmap, UInt32));
INSERT INTO bitmaps_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])), (2, bitmapBuild([])), (3, bitmapBuild([10, 20, 30]));
SELECT bitmapMin(bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM bitmaps_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, bitmapMin(bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM bitmaps_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bitmapMin(bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM (SELECT bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]) AS bitmap_data UNION ALL SELECT bitmapBuild([]) AS bitmap_data);
SELECT bitmapMin(bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM (SELECT bitmapBuild([15, 30, 5]) AS bitmap_data);

SELECT t.id, bitmapMin(t.bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM (SELECT id, bitmap_data FROM bitmaps_table WHERE id < 3) AS t JOIN (SELECT id, bitmapBuild([7, 9]) AS bitmap_data FROM bitmaps_table WHERE id = 2) AS j ON t.id = j.id;
SELECT id, bitmapMin(bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM (SELECT id, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]) AS bitmap_data) AS temp WHERE bitmapMin(bitmap_data) != UINT32_MAX;
SELECT bitmapMin(bitmap_data) AS min_value FROM bitmaps_table WHERE bitmap_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT bitmapMin(bitmapBuild([100, 50, 25, 10, 5])) AS min_value, bitmapMin(bitmapBuild([])) AS empty_case;
